block_00: Card chhaviyaan asvikrit kar di gayi
block_01: Durbhaagya se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi debit/credit card chhaviyaan ko asvikaar kar diya gaya kyuki aapke dvaara card ka pichala bhaag nahin bheja gaya tha.
block_02: Hum anurodh karte hain ki aap nimn link ke maadhyam se apne card ke donon side sahit naye card chhaviyaan upload karen.
block_04: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki sarahana karte hain.
block_07: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
